nuggets.idea_one_liner: The Garden of Eden isn't a place we lost; it is a presence we abandon every time we choose stress over God.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Powerful inversion of the Fall story that puts agency back in the believer's hands.

denominator_notes: Requires stopping the choosing of stress

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: We are in the Garden of Eden, constantly eating the apple... we choose to be stressed, rushed, anxious, tired. That is us eating our apples. I can tap into God at any time. And so can you.
proof_anchor_lines: Constantly eating the apple of stress
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: You are starving in the Garden of Eden.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: The man who refuses to eat the apple of anxiety.
nuggets.hook_angle_3_mechanism: The 5-second return to the presence of God.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Identify your 'apple' (stressor) right now and drop it. Choose to acknowledge God's presence in your current room instead.
